progress_summary: v1.4 plan approved. Theme: 'Coverage as a plugin registry — drastically expand language and platform support in one release.' Replacing the 5 hardcoded stacks (TS/Python/Ruby/Go/Rust) with skills/stack-forge/packs/<id>/pack.yml + reference docs. Scope at v1.4.0 cut: 20 packs (5 backfilled + 15 new) → 11+ languages, 9 deploy targets including App Store, 15+ frameworks. Mobile coverage limited to Apple/iOS/Swift in v1.4 (proves kind: mobile dispatch); Android/Flutter/RN deferred to v1.5 once release-ops ships. Distribution: bundle-everything in opchain-skills.zip, per-pack flags filter visibility not download. 8 PRs sequenced, PRs 4-7 parallelizable after PR 3. Linear parent ADEV-327; PR tickets ADEV-328 through ADEV-337 (sans 332/333). Branch: claude/expand-language-platform-support-t7Uu7. No code written yet — next step is PR 1 implementation (schema + generator + auto-flag wiring).

progress_table.label: Scope + 8-PR plan approved (incl. iOS pivot, distribution model)
Linear tickets ADEV-327..337 created and aligned with current scope
PR 1 — Architecture: schema, gen-stack-packs, auto-flag wiring, parity validator (ADEV-328)
PR 2 — Backfill 5 existing stacks + 4 platform adapters + equivalence fixtures (ADEV-329)
PR 3 — deploy-ops dispatcher + api-dev pack-read + kind:mobile branch (ADEV-330)
PR 4 — Modern web bulk: phoenix, remix, sveltekit, solid, bun, deno (ADEV-334)
PR 5 — Enterprise bulk: spring-java, dotnet-aspnet, spring-kotlin, laravel-php (ADEV-335)
PR 6 — Apple/iOS/Swift pack + app-store adapter, release-checklist dispatch (ADEV-336)
PR 7 — Hosting adapters: railway, netlify, heroku, aws-amplify (ADEV-337)
PR 8 — Site /coverage page, v1.4 pill, 5 skill version bumps, release (ADEV-331)

key_decisions: Theme: pack registry replaces hardcoded stack tables in stack-forge / api-dev / deploy-ops / app-architect / migration-ops.
Each pack is skills/stack-forge/packs/<id>/pack.yml + references/*.md; kind ∈ { server | mobile | platform-adapter }.
Coverage flags auto-generated as skills.coverage.<pack-id>.enabled (server + mobile only; adapters don't get a flag). Default = true if status:stable, else false.
Distribution: bundle-everything via existing make-skills-zip.sh. Flags filter what stack-forge OFFERS, not what's downloaded. Keeps regulated/air-gapped installs working.
Apple/iOS ships in v1.4.0 (PR 6); Android/Flutter/React Native deferred to v1.5 gated on release-ops (ADEV-308).
kind: mobile dispatch renders deploymentRef as a release checklist instead of executing commands. Output starts with explicit 'checklist-driven, not automated' notice.
Cloudflare stays the default platform after PR 3's dispatcher refactor; CF user output unchanged. Contract tests guard regressions.
Backfill (PR 2) ships snapshot equivalence fixtures so the 5 existing stacks produce byte-identical output to v1.2.
Only 5 skills version-bump 1.2.0 → 1.4.0 (stack-forge, api-dev, deploy-ops, app-architect, migration-ops). The other ~13 stay on 1.2.0.
Future option (v1.6+): split into opchain-core.zip + opchain-extras.zip if pack count crosses ~100 or refs get heavy. Document in CONTRIBUTING.md as guidance for pack authors.
PRs 4-7 parallelizable after PR 3 lands. PR 8 must merge last (badge count depends on final pack count).
ADEV-333 created in error during scope shift; cancelled as duplicate of ADEV-332. ADEV-332 repurposed as a rolling v1.4.x patch tracker (no fixed queue).
user_preferences: Pulls scope INTO releases when it expands the value prop; comfortable with bigger releases when 8-PR sequencing is clear.
Asks sharp clarifying questions about user-visible mechanics (downloads vs. visibility, plugin pattern) before approving implementation.
Prefers 'show me the implementation plan' as a checkpoint before writing code.
Wants Linear kept current with the actual plan — re-aligns tickets when scope shifts.

next_actions: PR 1: read existing src/lib/flags/registry.js, scripts/gen-flags.mjs, scripts/gen-skills-catalog.mjs, scripts/make-skills-zip.sh to ground the design in the current build pipeline.
PR 1: write skills/stack-forge/packs/_schema.json (JSON Schema for pack.yml — id/kind/status/since/language/runtime/frameworks/testRunner/buildCmd/lintCmd/defaultPlatform/supportedPlatforms/*Ref).
PR 1: write skills/stack-forge/packs/CONTRIBUTING.md — how to add a pack, ref-file conventions, status lifecycle, 50KB ref budget guidance.
PR 1: write scripts/gen-stack-packs.mjs — schema validation, ref-existence checks, adapter graph resolution, emits site/src/lib/stack-packs.generated.ts + skills/stack-forge/packs.generated.json.
PR 1: patch scripts/gen-flags.mjs to register skills.coverage.<pack-id>.enabled per server/mobile pack (default = status === 'stable').
PR 1: patch scripts/gen-skills-catalog.mjs to validate flags.required/exposes references resolve against generated coverage flags.
PR 1: reorder package.json prebuild → gen-stack-packs → gen-flags → gen-catalog → sync-docs → make-zip → astro build.
PR 1: add tests/stack-packs.test.js (schema + adapter graph + ref existence).
PR 1: zero-pack baseline — run npm run build + npm test, confirm green before any pack moves into the directory.
PR 1: open PR on claude/expand-language-platform-support-t7Uu7, link ADEV-328, mark it In Review.

skill_state.depends_on: v1.3 ships first (manual deploy 2026-05-11 per app-architect checkpoint).
